title.en: In the blink of an eye, 6,000 years have passed.

content.en:
Time passed, and every god general in the ancestral monument space was working hard to cultivate, and no one wanted to waste time.

For them, the ancestral monument space is a great opportunity, a real great opportunity.

Especially for those seven-star peak god generals, the ancestral monument space was their chance to achieve eight-star god generals.

If they want to impact the eight-star god generals in the outside world, it will be too difficult, even in the chaos, the opportunity to let some seven-star peak god generals break through the eight-star god generals is extremely rare.

In the chaos, although the seven-star god generals are rare, there are still some major forces, but it is too difficult and too difficult to want an eight-star god general.

Even among the forces with Dao Ancestors, only personal disciples and the top god generals can step into the ranks of eight-star god generals, which shows how difficult it is.

Therefore, it was their luck to be able to enter the ancestral monument space this time, and it could even be said that it was their only chance.

If they couldn't even break through to the ranks of the eight-star god generals in the ancestral monument space, then they could only choose to break through and become Heavenly Mandate Realm Heavenly Monarchs.

In the blink of an eye, 6,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and looked around, only to find that the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden had already broken through and became a seven-star late-stage god general, and her strength had improved very quickly.

On the contrary, it seems that his strength has not improved very quickly, and he has not even reached the peak of the early stage of the Seven Stars, but he is much stronger than when he first entered here.

For example, his Xuanxuan Jue has already stepped into the sixth layer of the consummation realm, and he is not far from the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Jue.

But the real harvest is the prototype of the Great Dao, he is about to achieve the prototype of the Great Dao, once he condenses the prototype of the Great Dao of Time and Space, his strength will skyrocket, and he doesn't know how much strength he can improve.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian was all ready, and he was about to start condensing the prototype of the Time and Space Dao.

A small universe in the body.

Ye Tian's Chaos Dao Origin Bead emerged, and immediately began to evolve the Great Dao, and infinite Origin Power emerged, slowly condensing the Great Dao.

This step can actually be carried out in the outside world, but that is too conspicuous, so Ye Tian evolves in the body, and there is a small space barrier, and the other gods in the outside world will not know that he is already condensing the prototype of the Great Dao.

"The prototype of the avenue is the entry point, as long as the kilometer of the avenue is condensed, it can be regarded as the prototype of the avenue can be completely condensed. "

According to the normal situation, the prototype of the avenue is 100 meters wide, and the avenue of time and space is the fusion of two avenues, so the width of the prototype of the condensed avenue is 200 meters.

Rumble!!!!

The 200-wide avenue condensed under the power of the source, but it was very unstable, because its length was only a few tens of centimeters.

As Ye Tian continued to condense, the length of the prototype of the Great Dao became longer and longer.

One meter!

Ten meters!

100 meters!

......

As time passed, the length of the rudimentary avenue grew longer and more stable.

After about a few decades, the prototype of the avenue finally grew to a length of 1,000 meters.

At the same time, the prototype of the avenue was completely stabilized.

At the moment when the prototype of the Great Dao was completely stabilized, Ye Tian's soul was shocked, and under the influence of the prototype of the Great Dao, he began to slowly ascend, becoming more and more powerful.

Moreover, the small universe in the body also began to expand, as if it was about to expand to the extent that it could withstand the rudimentary form of the Great Dao.

In addition, Ye Tian's divine power also began to transform.

Rumble!!!

Xuanxu Jue instantly broke through the bottleneck and stepped into the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Jue realm, which caused Ye Tian's strength to break through again, and stepped into the realm of the mid-stage seven-star god general, and it was not the first time to enter the mid-seven-star god general, but directly reached the peak of the seven-star mid-stage god general, and he was only one step away from stepping into the late seven-star god general.

Such a huge leap in strength is naturally not only a breakthrough in Xuanxuanjue, but also a condensation of the prototype of the Great Dao.

The Great Dao Prototype had a great increase in strength, which meant that Ye Tian had surpassed other Divine Generals and stepped into another level, belonging to the same level as those Heavenly Monarchs who were embarking on the path of True Ancestors.

At the god general level, it is almost impossible to condense the prototype of the Great Dao, only when they reach the Heavenly Mandate Realm, they will try to condense the prototype of the Great Dao, and it will take a long time, and some Heavenly Destiny Realm peak Heavenly Monarchs who are not talented enough have not condensed the prototype of the Great Dao.

It can be said that Ye Tian is already one step ahead of the others.

"There are also Dao patterns, once the two Dao patterns of time and space are inscribed, the Void Heaven Dao will transform, and my strength will skyrocket again, maybe I will step into the battle power of the Seven-Star Late Divine General!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although this increase in strength is too exaggerated, he is now the ancestor of the Dao, who dares to explore his secrets? Who dares to question him?

Therefore, Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly began to engrave the Dao pattern.

The Dao pattern engraved on the body of the Void Heaven Dao Body is a combination of the power of the Great Dao and the power of the Origin, and it is a rule engraved with the help of the prototype of the Great Dao, which is the rule corresponding to the Void Heaven Dao Body, which can make the Void Heaven Dao Body continue to grow.

Of course, with his current realm, he couldn't truly understand the Void Heaven Dao Body and Dao Pattern, so he could only cultivate step by step.

Ye Tian's first inscription was the spatial dao pattern, in an environment like the ancestral tablet space, the speed of inscription dao pattern was very fast, after all, his comprehension had increased to an unimaginable extent, otherwise it would take a long time just to engrave the spatial dao pattern.

Decade!

Century!

Millennium!

......

Since Ye Tian was the first time to engrave the Dao pattern, he was not very skilled, so he wasted a lot of time, and it took 2520 years to finally succeed in inscribed the spatial Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao body.

The Dao pattern was formed, and a trace of Dao pattern appeared in the center of Ye Tian's eyebrows, this is a Dao pattern that will only appear if the Void Heaven Dao Body is completely stimulated, if the Void Heaven Dao Body is not completely exploded, others will not be able to detect this pattern.

When the Dao pattern was formed, the Void Heaven Dao Body began to frantically absorb the vitality here, and Ye Tian also took out some resources to assist in cultivating the Void Heaven Dao Body, accelerating the transformation of the Void Heaven Dao Body.

The Void Heaven Dao Body was transformed, and Ye Tian's strength and whole body were improving, but the magnitude of this improvement was not too exaggerated, after all, it was just a Dao pattern.

After a long time, the transformation was over, and Ye Tian began to condense the second Dao pattern, the Time Dao pattern.

This time, the position of the inscription is on the back of the head, which corresponds to the spatial pattern.

The second time he engraved the Dao pattern, even if it was a different Dao pattern, Ye Tian was more skilled, and it only took 2000 years to completely engrave this time Dao pattern, which made the Void Heaven Dao Body improve a lot again.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength naturally increased significantly, and he had already reached the combat power of the seven-star late stage god generals.

God will be on the list.

Ye Tian, who was originally only the 94th on the list of god generals, has now risen to the 19th place on the list of god generals!

Outside.

Countless Divine Generals and Heavenly Monarchs, seeing that Ye Tian had entered the 19th place on the list of Divine Generals in just 10,000 years, they were dumbfounded one by one, and they couldn't believe it.

What's even more exaggerated is that Ye Tian surpassed the Yunzi Goddess, and the Yunzi Goddess was only ranked 20th!

The Yunzi Divine Maiden is also a Dao Ancestor ancestor, and it is not an ordinary Dao Ancestor's personal tradition, her previous strength was far above Ye Tian, but now she was surpassed by Ye Tian in a short time.

This means how terrifying Ye Tian's talent is!

Originally, Ye Tian was a little unconvinced, but now he is convinced one by one.
